agent_rule: Missing, denied, unresolved, partial, historical, and inferred evidence must never be reported as current proof.

normalized_missing_evidence.reason: Interpreter execution was intentionally deferred; exact versions, sys.path, prefixes, user-site state, and import origins are not established.
Launcher text is available, but environment-variable expansion, CALL/START flow resolution, shortcut targets, working directories, and runtime activation branches are not normalized yet.
Only bounded observed model files are present in V1A-0. The broader GGUF model library was not captured.
Observed database records are backups; the live database was not captured in V1A-0.
Processes, services, tasks, ports, signatures, installed applications, event failures, and resource deltas require a separate read-only phase.

source_missing_evidence: A static launcher reference is not proof that the referenced component is currently active.
Exact interpreter versions, sys.path, prefixes, environment differences, and active runtime ownership require a later explicitly bounded runtime-probe mission.
Exact runtime versions, sys.path, prefixes and host-versus-portable behavior were deliberately not executed in R2.
No Python interpreter other than the Workshop validation interpreter was launched by this collector.
Repository evidence is reference evidence and is not treated as proof of the live installation.
Windows live processes, services, startup, tasks, ports, event failures and signatures were deliberately deferred.
